input.command:
echo "=== force: activate app + reposition window to 200,150 + raise ==="
osascript <<'AS' 2>/dev/null
tell application "System Events"
  repeat with p in (every process whose name is "wine64-preloader")
    try
      repeat with w in (windows of p)
        if (name of w as string) contains "Homecoming" then
          set frontmost of p to true
          delay 0.3
          -- try to yank it onto a clearly visible coordinate
          try
            set position of w to {200, 150}
          end try
          try
            set value of attribute "AXMain" of w to true
          end try
          try
            perform action "AXRaise" of w
          end try
          delay 0.3
          set {px, py} to position of w
          return "acted. window now pos=" & px & "," & py
        end if
      end repeat
    end try
  end repeat
  return "no Homecoming window"
end tell
AS
sleep 1
echo
echo "=== full-screen capture to locate the window ==="
shot=/tmp/coh_fullscreen.png
screencapture -x "$shot" 2>/dev/null && echo "saved $shot" || echo "capture failed (Screen Recording perm?)"
echo
echo "=== how many Spaces / displays configured? ==="
defaults read com.apple.spaces 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'ManagedSpaceID|Current Space|uuid' | head -10 || echo "(spaces prefs not readable)"
echo "separate-spaces-per-display: $(defaults read com.apple.spaces spans-displays 2>/dev/null || echo 'default')"
